notify_alexa_devices_label: Enter the full state ID of the speak datapoint for each Echo device. The volume is set before the announcement and automatically restored afterwards by the Alexa adapter.
notify_alexa_hint: Announce location changes via Amazon Echo devices. Requires the ioBroker Alexa2 adapter.
notify_people_hint: General settings for all notifications — applies to both Telegram and Alexa.
notify_people_label: People are automatically synced from Life360. Prefix text and place toggles apply to both Telegram and Alexa. Recipients (Telegram only): comma-separated display names or Chat IDs from the recipients table (empty = all).
notify_recipients_label: Telegram recipients. The Chat ID is visible in the Telegram adapter (MESSAGES TAB) under authenticated users.
notify_telegram_hint: Notify Telegram users when a person enters a known location. Requires the ioBroker Telegram adapter.
family_map_header_name_help: If set, this name will be shown as the header in the Circle Map. Leave empty to use the circle name or default 'Circle'.
help_txt: You can find more information in the 'Help' tab!
life360_username: Email address (optional, fallback for password auth)
life360_username_help: Only needed if you want to use password-based login instead of token
location_unknown_name_help: Text shown in locationName when the person is at no known place (e.g. 'on tour'). Leave empty to keep blank.
place_radius: Radius (meters) in which a person is considered 'present'
places_txt:
Here you can add your own locations (independent of the Life360 app) to, for example, calculate distances or receive notifications when people arrive at or leave a location.
 (Use a period instead of a comma for latitude and longitude)
prioritize_myplaces_locationname_help: If enabled, a person's locationName is set to the My Place name while they are present. Otherwise the Life360 location name is used.
screenshot_txt: Screenshots of the browser DevTools (F12) with the token value highlighted • (using DevTools in a new window is recommended):
token_hint:
EU users – how to get your Bearer token:
1. Open https://life360.com/login
2. Enter your email address → click Continue
3. Enter the one-time code sent to your email
4. Open browser DevTools (F12) → Network tab
5. Find the POST request named 'token' and/or 'bearer' (not OPTIONS)
6. Open Preview / Response tab → copy the value of 'access_token' and paste it below

Enter the token WITHOUT the word 'Bearer' and WITHOUT spaces!

The token is valid for several months.
tracker_clear_recordings_info: ⚠ Note: Clearing a person's recordings also affects the circle map, as it is built from the individual person data. The monthly GeoJSON files (currentYear) are not changed.
tracker_color_header_bg_help: Background color of the map header bar
tracker_color_header_border_help: Color of the dividing line below the header
tracker_color_page_bg_help: Background color of the map page
tracker_enabled_help: Can also be controlled via state tracker.config.enabled (e.g. by CRON)
tracker_info_txt:
Changes are applied immediately on the server after saving and the maps are regenerated.
The update becomes visible in the browser on the next automatic reload or immediately by manually reloading the page (F5). The map's hamburger menu (☰) also provides a reload button for an immediate page refresh – even when the map is opened in a popup.
tracker_info2_txt: The map URL can be found in the object tree under tracker.circle.url and tracker.<Person>.url.
tracker_marker_opacity_help: Opacity of the position marker (0.0 = transparent, 1.0 = fully visible)
tracker_marker_size_help: Size factor for the position marker (0.5 = half, 1.0 = default, 2.0 = double)
tracker_myplaces_color_help: Color of the flag markers for own places
tracker_myplaces_flag_opacity_help: Opacity of the flag markers for own places (0.0 = transparent, 1.0 = fully visible)
tracker_myplaces_flag_size_help: Size factor for the flag markers (0.5 = half, 1.0 = default, 3.0 = triple)
tracker_people_hint: Min. dist (m): Minimum distance in meters a person must travel before a new route point is recorded. 0 = default (10 m).
tracker_places_color_help: Color of the flag markers for Life360 places
tracker_places_flag_opacity_help: Opacity of the flag markers for Life360 places (0.0 = transparent, 1.0 = fully visible)
tracker_places_flag_size_help: Size factor for the flag markers (0.5 = half, 1.0 = default, 3.0 = triple)
tracker_popup_opacity_help: Opacity of map popups (0.0 = transparent, 1.0 = fully visible)
tracker_retention_days_help: Number of days to keep route data. Older days are removed automatically every day and on adapter start. 0 = keep forever.
tracker_default_days_help: Number of days shown by default when opening the map. 1 = today only, 2 = today + yesterday, etc. The start date resets to this value every time the map is opened.
tracker_route_weight_help: Width of the route line in pixels (1-10)
tracker_show_myplaces_help: Show custom places (My Places) as flag markers on all tracker maps
tracker_show_places_help: Show Life360 cloud places as flag markers on all tracker maps
